subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Wronged One of the horizons unto a leaf among the leaves of the Tree of Divine Knowledge, that it may be seized by the rapture of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه ایست از مظلوم آفاق بسوی ورقة از اوراق سدرة عرفان لیاخذها جذب بیان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for women
